name: Install Selection
description: The request and catalog side of the ECC installer: the user-authored config plus the profile, module, and component contracts that resolve what gets installed.

name: Install Outcome & Persistence
description: Durable records and environment preferences produced after a config is applied: the persisted install-state manifest and the package-manager preference consulted by the install flow.

name: Runtime Control Plane
description: The central state-store contract and its entity definitions (sessions, skill runs/versions, decisions, governance events, work items) plus skill provenance — the continuous-learning and governance persistence layer.

name: Harness Extension Config
description: Contracts for the runtime artifacts the installer lays down into the target Claude harness: the hooks configuration with its action/matcher definitions and the plugin manifest.
